# apps/web/components/ui

Reusable UI component primitives built on @base-ui/react and styled with Tailwind CSS utility classes. Components use class-variance-authority for type-safe variant composition and data-slot attributes for parent-aware styling.

## Contents

### Component Primitives

**[badge.tsx](./badge.tsx)** — polymorphic `Badge` component with six variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost, link) and `badgeVariants` cva function; supports icon positioning via data-icon attributes.

**[button.tsx](./button.tsx)** — `Button` wrapper around `@base-ui/react` ButtonPrimitive; exports `buttonVariants` with six style variants and five size presets (default/xs/sm/lg/icon sizes).

**[card.tsx](./card.tsx)** — composite card structure: `Card` root with size prop, `CardHeader` with grid layout, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardAction`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter`; uses data-slot for CSS selectors.

## Design Patterns

**Polymorphic Components:** badge.tsx uses `useRender` hook with `defaultTagName: "span"`, accepting `render` prop for tag customization.

**Variant Composition:** All components use `cva` from class-variance-authority; `badgeVariants` and `buttonVariants` export reusable cva configs consumed by component className props.

**Data-Slot Architecture:** Components apply `data-slot` attributes enabling descendant selectors (`has-data-[slot=X]`, `group-data-[size=sm]/card`) for parent-aware styling without prop drilling.

**Icon Positioning:** badge.tsx and button.tsx detect icon placement via `has-data-[icon=inline-start]` and `has-data-[icon=inline-end]` selectors, adjusting padding responsively.

**State Styling:** All components handle focus-visible, aria-invalid, aria-expanded, active, disabled states via Tailwind pseudo-class variants; dark mode support via `dark:` prefix.

## Dependencies

Shared across components: `@base-ui/react` (headless primitives), `class-variance-authority` (variant composition), `cn` utility from `@/lib/utils` (className merging).

## Behavioral Contracts

**badgeVariants base classes:**
```
"group/badge inline-flex h-5 w-fit shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1 overflow-hidden rounded-4xl border border-transparent px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-1.5 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-1.5 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&>svg]:pointer-events-none [&>svg]:size-3!"
```

**buttonVariants icon sizing selectors:**
- Size default: `[&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4`
- Size xs/sm/lg: `[&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3.5`
- Icon variants: `[&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-[1.125rem]` (icon), `[&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3` (icon-xs), `[&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3.5` (icon-sm), `[&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-5` (icon-lg)

**Card grid layout selector:** `CardHeader` uses `has-data-[slot=card-action]:grid-cols-[1fr_auto]` to enable auto-placement when `CardAction` is present.
